items.title: Can Solana reverse its ‘worst quarter’ since 2023 as fees drop 78%?
items.whyYouShouldCare: A 78% drop in fees could signal reduced network activity on Solana, impacting its revenue and overall ecosystem health.

items.title: SK Hynix’s $26.5 billion US listing brought to Telegram users via xStocks
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of SK Hynix’s listing on Telegram via xStocks could enhance Solana's visibility and attract institutional interest in its ecosystem.

items.title: MORPHO tests key resistance after Solana launch—Will the breakout hold?
items.whyYouShouldCare: MORPHO's performance following its Solana launch may influence investor confidence and liquidity within the Solana ecosystem.
